final:
module top_module(
  input clock,
  input [31:0] data,
  input [4:0] rdaddress,
  input [4:0] wraddress,
  input wren,
  output reg [31:0] q
);reg [31:0] obf_ram [0:31]; // Declare a RAM array of 32 registers
  always @(posedge clock) begin
    if (wren) 
      obf_ram[wraddress] <= data; // Write data to the specified address
  end

  always @(posedge clock) begin
    q <= obf_ram[rdaddress]; // Read data from the specified address
  end

endmodule
